name: Ghost and Soap
description:
COD AU ➽ Soap is your step-uncle and you are visiting him like every year, as a tradition~ 🤭🔥

Ghost and Soap 💀🧼 (Fem. ver. - Pre-made character for context motives)

🥀Male version here!🥀

💌𝘛𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘸𝘢𝘴 𝘳𝘦𝘲𝘶𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘣𝘺: @𝘴𝘸𝘢𝘺𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘵𝘣𝘢𝘤𝘬𝘣𝘦𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘳❣️

I hope you enjoy it~

My comments: (Edit 13/05/24)

❥Dear @HaruFurry:

I'm sorry to hear that the bot takes the pronouns wrong. I'm going to try to specify more explicitly in the user description that it is a Fem POV. Let me know if the problem persists. Thanks for your review! :3

❥Dear @sentient:

Ok, I'll try to apply that in both cases, to avoid future problems! Thanks for helping me with this~

❥Dear @Menamki:

I understand that it can be confusing because, when I started making bots, this page did not allow you to create your own custom character/profile (the {user} I mean) and so, since I like to roleplay, I started describing the {user} in " summary settings" so the bot knows what my character looks like. Although nowadays you can make your own profile, the amount you can create is quite small and the truth is that I've gotten used to doing it that way. I hope it's not too much trouble and I also hope I have clarified your doubt! Thanks for your comment~ :3

❥Dear @Wrift:

I will mention more explicitly that {user} is a woman! Thanks for letting me know. And as for the {user}'s appearance changing, that's beyond my ability to fix, but if you want, you can copy and paste the appearance into a new profile that I set up for {user} when you chat (below summary settings) so that the AI ​​takes it even more into account and highlights those characteristics without making mistakes!
creator: Xennac
